pushing something from left to right: a video showing hands pushing an object horizontally from the left side of the frame to the right side, with the object sliding across a surface
pushing something from right to left: a video showing hands pushing an object horizontally from the right side of the frame to the left side, with the object sliding across a surface
moving something up: a video showing hands lifting an object vertically upward, raising it from a lower position to a higher position
moving something down: a video showing hands lowering an object vertically downward, moving it from a higher position to a lower position
pulling something from left to right: a video showing hands pulling an object from the left side toward the right, often with a grasping motion
pulling something from right to left: a video showing hands pulling an object from the right side toward the left, often with a grasping motion
putting something into something: a video showing hands placing one object inside another container or receptacle
taking something out of something: a video showing hands removing an object from inside a container or receptacle
opening something: a video showing hands opening a container, door, or lid by pulling, rotating, or lifting
closing something: a video showing hands closing a container, door, or lid by pushing, rotating, or lowering
turning something upside down: a video showing hands flipping an object so its top becomes its bottom
putting something on a surface: a video showing hands placing an object down onto a flat surface like a table
picking something up: a video showing hands grasping and lifting an object from a surface
dropping something: a video showing hands releasing an object to let it fall downward
throwing something: a video showing hands propelling an object through the air with force
catching something: a video showing hands receiving and grasping an object that is moving through the air
rolling something: a video showing hands causing an object to rotate and move along a surface
folding something: a video showing hands bending a flexible object to create creases or layers
unfolding something: a video showing hands straightening a folded object by reversing the creases
covering something with something: a video showing hands placing one object on top of another to hide or protect it
uncovering something: a video showing hands removing a cover from an object to reveal what is underneath
stacking something: a video showing hands placing objects on top of each other to form a pile
unstacking something: a video showing hands removing objects from a pile one by one
tearing something: a video showing hands ripping or pulling apart a material into pieces
bending something: a video showing hands applying force to curve or flex an object
squeezing something: a video showing hands applying pressure to compress an object
poking something: a video showing a finger or object pressing into something briefly
spinning something: a video showing hands causing an object to rotate rapidly around its axis
tilting something: a video showing hands angling an object from its normal position
shaking something: a video showing hands moving an object rapidly back and forth
